010package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
011
012import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
013import edu.wpi.first.math.VecBuilder;
014import edu.wpi.first.math.Vector;
015import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
016import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
017import edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3;
018import edu.wpi.first.math.util.Units;
019import edu.wpi.first.networktables.BooleanSubscriber;
020import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
021import edu.wpi.first.units.*;
022import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.*;
023import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.LEDPattern;
024import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.simulation.SingleJointedArmSim;
025import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.util.Color;
026import com.ctre.phoenix6.CANBus;
027import dev.doglog.DogLog;
028
029import com.pathplanner.lib.path.PathConstraints;
030import com.stuypulse.stuylib.network.SmartNumber;
031
032/*-
033 * File containing tunable settings for every subsystem on the robot.
034 *
035 * We use DogLog's tunables in order to have tunable
036 * values that we can edit on whatever dashboard we
037 * are using.
038 */
039public interface Settings {
040
041    Time DT = Seconds.of(0.020);
042
043    boolean DEBUG_MODE = true;
044
045    CANBus CANBUS = new CANBus("rio");
046
047    public interface EnabledSubsystems {
048
049        BooleanSubscriber FEEDER = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Feeder", false);
050
051        BooleanSubscriber INTAKE = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Intake", true);
052
053        BooleanSubscriber LED = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/LED", false);
054
055        BooleanSubscriber HANDOFF = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Handoff", false);
056
057        BooleanSubscriber SHOOTER = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Shooter", false);
058
059        BooleanSubscriber VISION = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Vision", false);
060
061        BooleanSubscriber SWERVE = DogLog.tunable("Enabled Subsystems/Swerve", false);
062    }
063
064    public interface Vision {
065
066        // TODO: These numbers are temporary, may need testing
067        public final Vector<N3> MT1_STDEVS = VecBuilder.fill(0.5, 0.5, 1.0);
068
069        public final Vector<N3> MT2_STDEVS = VecBuilder.fill(0.7, 0.7, 694694.0);
070
071        public final Pose2d INVALID_POSITION = Pose2d.kZero;
072
073        public final double MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY_RAD_SEC = 2 * Math.PI;
074    }
075
076    public interface Intake {
077
078        public interface Pivot {
079
080            // state angles
081            // TODO:Get new pivot angles
082            Angle INITIAL_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102);
083
084            Angle STOW_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102);
085
086            Angle DEPLOY_ANGLE = Degrees.of(22);
087
088            Angle AGITATE_UP_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-42);
089
090            Angle DIGEST_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-92);
091
092            // misc
093            Angle ANGLE_TOLERANCE = Degrees.of(0.5);
094
095            Angle PUSHDOWN_THRESHOLD = Degrees.of(20);
096
097            DoubleSubscriber PUSHDOWN_CURRENT = DogLog.tunable("Intake/Pivot/Pushdown Current Tuning Amps", 30.0);
098
099            // amps
100            Current STALL_CURRENT = Amps.of(25);
101
102            // TODO: set this up?
103            Time STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC = Seconds.of(0.0);
104
105            Voltage HOMING_DOWN_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(3);
106
107            // sysid
108            Velocity<VoltageUnit> RAMP_RATE = Volts.of(1).per(Second);
109
110            Voltage STEP_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(1);
111
112            // sim
113            Angle MIN_ANGLE = Degrees.of(0);
114
115            Angle MAX_ANGLE = Degrees.of(-102.0);
116
117            double GEAR_RATIO = 60.0;
118
119            Distance PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH = Meters.of(0.1439822);
120
121            // mass in kg
122            MomentOfInertia MOI = KilogramSquareMeters.of(SingleJointedArmSim.estimateMOI(PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH.in(Meters), 1));
123        }
124
125        public interface Roller {
126
127            Current STALL_CURRENT = Amps.of(50);
128
129            Time STALL_DEBOUNCE_SEC = Seconds.of(0.1);
130
131            double GEAR_RATIO = 16.0 / 27.0;
132
133            MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.001);
134
135            double IDLE_DUTY_CYCLE = 0;
136
137            double INTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE = 1;
138
139            double OUTTAKE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1;
140        }
141    }
142
143    public interface Feeder {
144
145        double FEEDER_REVERSE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1;
146
147        double FEEDER_FORWARD_DUTY_CYCLE = 1;
148
149        // TODO: get from mec
150        double GEAR_RATIO = 34/14; // (34/14) : 1
151
152        MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.001);
153    }
154
155    public interface LED {
156
157        // TODO: Get actual length of led, along with length of individual sections
158        int LED_LENGTH = 80;
159
160        // Buffer Views {Starting Index, Ending Index}
161        int[] SHOOTER_BUFFER = { 0, 19 };
162
163        int[] FEEDER_BUFFER = { 20, 39 };
164
165        int[] INTAKE_BUFFER = { 40, 59 };
166
167        int[] HANDOFF_BUFFER = { 60, 79 };
168
169        // shooter
170        LEDPattern SHOOTING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kOrange);
171
172        LEDPattern FERRYING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPurple);
173
174        LEDPattern MANUAL = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPeru);
175
176        // feeder
177        LEDPattern FEEDER_FORWARD = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kBlue);
178
179        LEDPattern FEEDER_REVERSE = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kRed);
180
181        // intake
182        LEDPattern INTAKING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kYellow);
183
184        LEDPattern OUTTAKING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGreen);
185
186        LEDPattern HOMING_DOWN = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGainsboro);
187
188        LEDPattern AGITATING = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kCyan);
189
190        // handoff
191        LEDPattern HANDOFF_FORWARD = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kDarkOrange);
192
193        // mmm papaya whip
194        LEDPattern HANDOFF_REVERSE = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kPapayaWhip);
195
196        // states
197        LEDPattern DISABLED = LEDPattern.solid(Color.kGray);
198    }
199
200    public interface Handoff {
201
202        double IDLE_DUTY_CYCLE = 0.0;
203
204        double FORWARD_DUTY_CYCLE = 1.0;
205
206        double REVERSE_DUTY_CYCLE = -1.0;
207
208        double STALL_CURRENT = 67;
209
210        // TODO: get and maybe convert to wpilib units
211        double STALL_DEBOUNCE = 67;
212
213        double J_KG_METERS_SQUARED = 1;
214
215        double GEAR_RATIO = 1.0 / 3.0; // 1:3
216    }
217
218    public interface Shooter {
219
220        Time SHOOT_TIME_AUTO = Seconds.of(1.5);
221
222        Velocity<VoltageUnit> RAMP_RATE = Volts.of(1).per(Second);
223
224        Voltage STEP_VOLTAGE = Volts.of(7);
225
226        Distance WHEEL_RADIUS = Inches.of(4);
227
228        // Sim
229        MomentOfInertia J = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.1);
230
231        double GEAR_RATIO = 0.1;
232
233        // TODO: get
234        Distance FLYWHEEL_RADIUS = Inches.of(3);
235
236        // TODO: Test for manual shooting RPM
237        AngularVelocity MANUAL_HUB_RPM = RPM.of(3000);
238
239        AngularVelocity MIN_SHOOTER_VELOCITY = RPM.of(1740);
240
241        DoubleSubscriber SHOOT_TUNING_RPM = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/Shoot Tuning RPM", 0.0);
242        DoubleSubscriber FERRY_TUNING_RPM = DogLog.tunable("Shooter/Ferry Tuning RPM", 0.0);
243
244        public interface RPMInterpolation {
245
246            double[][] distanceRPMInterpolationValues = { { 1.0, 1000.0 }, { 2.0, 1500.0 }, { 3.0, 2000.0 }, { 4.0, 2500.0 }, { 5.0, 3000.0 } };
247        }
248
249        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
250        public interface TOFInterpolation {
251
252            double[][] distanceTOFInterpolationValues = { { 1.0, 0.5 }, { 2.0, 0.75 }, { 3.0, 1.0 }, { 4.0, 1.25 }, { 5.0, 1.5 } };
253        }
254
255        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
256        public interface FerryRPMInterpolation {
257
258            double[][] ferryDistanceRPMInterpolation = { { 1.0, 1000.0 }, { 2.0, 1500.0 }, { 3.0, 2000.0 }, { 4.0, 2500.0 }, { 5.0, 3000.0 } };
259        }
260
261        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
262        public interface FerryTOFInterpolation {
263
264            double[][] FerryTOFInterpolationInterpolation = { { 1.0, 0.5 }, { 2.0, 0.75 }, { 3.0, 1.0 }, { 4.0, 1.25 }, { 5.0, 1.5 } };
265        }
266        // These values are placeholders and should be replaced with actual data from testing
267    }
268
269    public interface Swerve {
270
271        double MODULE_VELOCITY_DEADBAND_M_PER_S = 0.1;
272
273        double ROTATIONAL_DEADBAND_RAD_PER_S = 0.1;
274
275        public interface Constraints {
276
277            double MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S = 4.3;
278
279            // TODO: revert to 15.0
280            double MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED = 2.0;
281
282            double MAX_ANGULAR_VEL_RAD_PER_S = Units.degreesToRadians(400.0);
283
284            // TODO: revert to 900
285            double MAX_ANGULAR_ACCEL_RAD_PER_S = Units.degreesToRadians(300.0);
286
287            PathConstraints DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS = new PathConstraints(MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S, MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED, MAX_ANGULAR_VEL_RAD_PER_S, MAX_ANGULAR_ACCEL_RAD_PER_S);
288        }
289
290        public interface Alignment {
291
292            public interface Constraints {
293
294                double DEFAULT_MAX_VELOCITY = 4.3;
295
296                double DEFAULT_MAX_ACCELERATION = 15.0;
297
298                double DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY = Units.degreesToRadians(400.0);
299
300                double DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_ACCELERATION = Units.degreesToRadians(900.0);
301            }
302
303            public interface Tolerances {
304
305                Distance X_TOLERANCE = Inches.of(2.0);
306
307                Distance Y_TOLERANCE = Inches.of(2.0);
308
309                Rotation2d THETA_TOLERANCE = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(1);
310
311                Pose2d POSE_TOLERANCE = new Pose2d(X_TOLERANCE.in(Meters), Y_TOLERANCE.in(Meters), THETA_TOLERANCE);
312
313                LinearVelocity MAX_VELOCITY_WHEN_ALIGNED = MetersPerSecond.of(0.15);
314
315                Time ALIGNMENT_DEBOUNCE = Seconds.of(0.15);
316            }
317
318            public interface Targets {
319
320                // TODO: Get actual angle
321                Rotation2d HUB_LEFT_CORNER = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(45);
322
323                Rotation2d HUB_RIGHT_CORNER = Rotation2d.fromDegrees(-45);
324            }
325        }
326    }
327
328    public interface Driver {
329
330        double BUZZ_TIME = 1.0;
331
332        double BUZZ_INTENSITY = 1.0;
333
334        public interface Drive {
335
336            double DEADBAND = 0.05;
337
338            double RC = 0.05;
339
340            double POWER = 2.0;
341        }
342
343        public interface Turn {
344
345            double DEADBAND = 0.05;
346
347            double RC = 0.05;
348
349            double POWER = 2.0;
350        }
351    }
352}
